report.summary: Built comprehensive learn guide on Cross-Chain Intents & ERC-7683 — covering the shift from traditional bridges to intent-based systems, the ERC-7683 standard, top protocols (Across, UniswapX, deBridge, NEAR Intents, Cowswap), risks, and the chain abstraction future.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: ERC-7683 proposed by Uniswap Labs + Across Protocol defines CrossChainOrder struct and ISettlementContract interface for universal cross-chain intent execution
Intent-based protocols now dominate L2 cross-chain volume — Across processes transfers in ~2s median, deBridge has processed $9.96B+ total volume
Key trend: fillers (solvers) compete to fill user intents, driving costs down — Across charges ~$0.04 for USDC transfers vs traditional bridge fees of $1-5+
Bridge market ~$18.8B in 30-day volume (DefiLlama); intent protocols capturing increasing share vs lock-and-mint bridges
Emerging: AI-powered solver optimization, gasless execution via UniswapX, and intent composability (chaining swaps + bridges + DeFi deposits)
Risk vectors: filler centralization, oracle manipulation in settlement, non-EVM standardization gaps

sections.title: Content Created
items: Full learn guide (~3,000 words): 'Cross-Chain Intents Guide 2026: ERC-7683, Fillers & the End of Traditional Bridges'
7 sections: What Are Intents, Bridges vs Intents comparison table, ERC-7683 deep dive, Intent Settlement lifecycle, Top 5 Protocols table, Risks & Limitations, Future (Chain Abstraction)
6 FAQ items targeting 'People Also Ask' queries (what are cross-chain intents, ERC-7683 vs bridges, safety, supported protocols, fillers explained, non-EVM support)
